name: Mexican-Style Hot Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
Not aspertame - loses sweetness when heated.
For cocoa mix, in a storage container combine dry milk powder, cocoa powder, powdered sugar substitute, and cinnamon. Mix well. Cover and store in a cool, dry place up to 8 weeks.
For each serving, place 1/3 cup of the cocoa mix in a mug. Add 2/3 cup boiling water; stir until dissolved. Makes 9 servings, each 8 oz.
1 serving contains 113 calories, 8 g protein, 14 g carbohydrate, 4 g total fat, 2 g saturated fat, 4 mg cholesterol, 120 mg sodium, and 413 mg potassium.
